title: You are Kernel (the Codex-first orchestration system). FUGUE (Claude orchestrator) is requesting a formal development handover. Please provide: (1) Current Kernel system state and configuration, (2) Active development records and recent changes, (3) Pending tasks and blockers, (4) Key architectural...
summary_text: **Kernel Development Handover** Prepared from `~/.codex/memories` plus current `.claude` runtime/config on 2026-03-13. **1. Current Kernel System State And Configuration** - Kernel is defined in memory as the Codex-first orchestration system derived from FUGUE; FUGUE remains the parent lineage and rollback path. - Kernel policy is live in [`rules/quality-gates.json`](/Users/masayuki/.claude/rules/quality-gates.json): `kernel.mode="informed-judge"`, weights `security=3 / factual=2 / opinion=1`, `agentTeams="sealed"`, `planningDelegate="codex"`, `simulationDelegate="codex-spark"`, Spark model `o4-mini-high`, timeout `30s`. - Delegation tiers are codified in [`docs/delegation-matrix.md`](/Users/masayuki/.claude/docs/delegation-matrix.md): Tier 0 Spark check, Tier 1 spot advisory, Tier 2 six-lane Codex+GLM, Tier 3 sequential high-risk review, Tier 4 handoff chain. - Live fallback runtime is still FUGUE-centered, not Kernel-native: [`fallback/status.json`](/Users/masayuki/.claude/fallback/status.json) currently reports `mode=claude`, `primary_engine=claude`, `fallback_engine=codex`, `fallback_running=false`, orchestrator PID `640`, started `2026-03-12T09:55:40Z`, last health `probe_slow_ok`. - [`fallback/config.json`](/Users/masayuki/.claude/fallback/config.json) keeps Claude as orchestrator (`model_id="gpt-5.4"`), Codex/GLM/Gemini as delegated engines, voting enabled, context compaction enabled, and closed/critical service bridges enabled. **2. Active Development Records And Recent Changes** - Recent commits on 2026-03-13 are sync commits: `1bdcbc3f`, `07b5b25f`, `a4de28f8`, `a1e72a23`. - The Mar 13 work added or updated the v2.1 contract and execution plumbing: [`AGENTS.md`](/Users/masayuki/.claude/AGENTS.md), [`docs/kernel-orchestration-v2.md`](/Users/masayuki/.claude/docs/kernel-orchestration-v2.md), [`docs/delegation-matrix.md`](/Users/masayuki/.claude/docs/delegation-matrix.md), [`rules/dangerous-permission-consensus.md`](/Users/masayuki/.claude/rules/dangerous-permission-consensus.md), [`rules/quality-gates.json`](/Users/masayuki/.claude/rules/quality-gates.json), and the orchestra-delegator scripts. - Execution-side changes already landed for Spark and v2.1 naming/failover: [`skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/delegate.js`](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/delegate.js), [`skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/delegate-glm.js`](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/delegate-glm.js), [`skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/consensus-vote.js`](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/consensus-vote.js), [`skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/consensus-logic.js`](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/consensus-logic.js), [`skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/failover.js`](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/failover.js). - Current working tree is almost clean. Uncommitted state is only two NotebookLM management marker files plus untracked `auth.env`. I did not read `auth.env`. **3. Pending Tasks And Blockers** - Spark is configured but not currently operational in this environment; see section 5. - The v2.1 plan still lists follow-up work in [`plans/graceful-yawning-cosmos.md`](/Users/masayuki/.claude/plans/graceful-yawning-cosmos.md): Agent Teams sealing hook, MAX-mode full removal, and automatic rate-limit fallback hardening. - Happy.app remains a seed. Memory dated 2026-03-07 says production host, real intake/state endpoints, recovery-console wiring, real Crow summaries, mobile auth boundary, one Pencil pass, one Gemini critique pass, and mac mini 24h heartbeat validation are still pending. - Happy VM operational docs show local backup is working, but GitHub remote sync still needs PAT auth; auth-stale recovery is drafted, not finished. **4. Key Architectural Decisions Made** - Kernel is the default sovereign path; FUGUE must remain a first-class reversible path. Changing sovereign path should be mostly a `hand...
